title: Selaginella caudata

The classification of Selaginella caudata is supported by its morphological and molecular characteristics. intro: Selaginella caudata is a type of ancient fern-like plant, commonly known as resurrection fern, that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties.
